flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwest Missouri State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.9k → $17.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Missouri State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northwest Missouri State University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (33.9% → 41.9%).
